scripts.deploy:prod: npm run test && npm run migration:lint && npm run d1:migrate:prod && npm run config:import && wrangler deploy
scripts.migration:lint: if grep -riE 'DROP TABLE|DROP COLUMN|RENAME COLUMN|RENAME TABLE' migrations/ | grep -v 'lint-ok'; then echo 'ERROR: destructive migration detected — use additive-only schema changes' && exit 1; fi
